name: Neuronetics, Inc.
summary: PARTI Overview Neuronetics, Inc. (the Company or Neuronetics or the Registrant) believes that mental health is as important as physical health. As a global leader in neuroscience, the Company is delivering more treatment options to patients and healthcare providers by offering exceptional in-office treatments that produce extraordinary results.
